summary.key_theme: ICE 透過完成對 Polymarket 的 16.4 億美元投資展現強勁資本實力，同時受惠於地緣政治不確定性帶動的交易量激增。

bullish.title: Intercontinental Exchange Announces New $600 Million Investment in Polymarket
bullish.reason: ICE 完成對預測市場平台 Polymarket 的 6 億美元注資，使其總持股價值達到 16.4 億美元，顯示公司積極布局新興金融科技領域的決心。

bullish.title: ICE Reports Record Market Activity as Customers Respond to Middle East Impacts
bullish.reason: 受中東局勢影響，ICE 旗下商品與能源期貨（如原油、天然氣及布蘭特原油）交易量創下歷史新高，直接推升交易手續費收入預期。

bullish.title: New York Stock Exchange and Securitize Agree to Memorandum of Understanding to Support Tokenized Securities
bullish.reason: NYSE 與 Securitize 合作推動證券代幣化系統，顯示 ICE 在數位資產基礎設施領域的技術領先地位，有助於未來開拓新業務模式。

bearish.title: ICE First Look at Mortgage Performance: Prepayments Rise on Recent Refinance Activity and Serious Delinquencies Increase as Cure Rates Slow
bearish.reason: 房貸績效報告顯示嚴重拖欠率上升且修復率放緩，這可能對 ICE 的房貸技術與數據服務部門的長期營收成長構成壓力。

neutral.title: Canlan Sports Reports Record $100 Million in Revenue and 14% Growth in Operating Earnings for 2025
neutral.reason: 此新聞涉及代號同樣為 ICE 的 Canlan Sports Corp.，與 Intercontinental Exchange 無關，屬於誤報。
